project.description:
F49 — redfish account_provision multi-vendor 호환성 검증. - Dell iDRAC (10.100.15.27, 10.100.15.31) — patch_empty_slot 또는 patch_existing 검증 - HPE iLO (10.50.11.231) — primary 통과 (이미 infraops 존재) - Lenovo XCC (10.50.11.232) — primary 통과 (이미 infraops 존재) - Cisco CIMC (10.100.15.2) — not_supported graceful
Vault password file: .vault_pass (Goodmit0802!) 소스: F49 cycle 2026-05-01 (사용자 사이트 실측 + label 매칭 fix).

hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.name: DRYRUN
hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.description: true=실제 BMC 변경 없음 (시뮬레이션). false=BMC 에 infraops 공통계정 실 생성/PATCH.

hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.name: TARGET
hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.description: 검증 대상 BMC. all=5대 매트릭스, 또는 단일 IP.

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail
echo "==== F49 redfish account_provision verify ====" echo "DRYRUN=${DRYRUN}" echo "TARGET=${TARGET}" echo "BRANCH=${BRANCH}" echo "WORKSPACE=${WORKSPACE}"
cd "${WORKSPACE}"
# .vault_pass — Jenkins credentials binding (vault-password) 권장 # 임시: agent 의 ~/.vault_pass 또는 ENV 변수 if [[ ! -f .vault_pass ]]; then echo 'Goodmit0802!' > .vault_pass chmod 600 .vault_pass fi
# /opt/ansible-env activate if [[ -f /opt/ansible-env/bin/activate ]]; then source /opt/ansible-env/bin/activate fi
# verify 스크립트 실행 chmod +x scripts/verify_account_provision.sh if [[ "${TARGET}" == "all" ]]; then ACCOUNT_PROVISION_DRYRUN=${DRYRUN} bash scripts/verify_account_provision.sh else ACCOUNT_PROVISION_DRYRUN=${DRYRUN} bash scripts/verify_account_provision.sh --target "${TARGET}" fi
echo echo "==== Build complete ===="
